description: Create an ergonomic 'Central Monitoring Dashboard' in OpenICE by launching the 'Vital Signs' clinical application, a simulated 'Infusion Pump' device adapter, and a simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter. Arrange the windows in a non-overlapping T-Layout where the 'Vital Signs' app occupies the top half of the screen, the 'Infusion Pump' window is in the bottom-left quadrant, and the 'Multiparameter Monitor' window is in the bottom-right quadrant. Save a screenshot of the final layout to /home/ga/Desktop/dashboard_layout.png.
